# Programming Manual

> Programming reference for Stimulsoft Reports and Dashboards. Covers integration across .NET, WEB, JS, PHP, Java, Python and WPF platforms: embedding viewers and designers, connecting data sources, exporting reports, licensing, and API usage.

## Introduction

- [Technical Support](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Introduction/Technical_Support.md)
- [Trial Limitations](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Introduction/Trial_Limitations.md)
- [Web Links and Online Resources](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Introduction/Web_Links_and_Online_Resources.md)

## Deployment

- [Libraries of Report.WEB Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/DLLs_in_Reports_Web_Package.md)
- [Libraries of Reports.NET Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/DLLs_in_Reports_Net_Package.md)
- [Scripts of Reports.JS Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Reports_JS_Package.md)
- [Libraries of Reports.WPF Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/DLLs_in_Reports_Wpf_Package.md)
- [Scripts of Reports.PHP Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Reports_PHP_Package.md)
- [JAR Files of Reports.JAVA Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/JAR_Files_in_Reports_Java_Package.md)
- [Libraries of Dashboards.WEB Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/DLLs_in_Dashboards_WEB_Package.md)
- [Libraries of Dashboards.WIN Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/DLLs_in_Dashboards_WIN_Package.md)
- [Scripts of Dashboards.JS Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Scripts_in_Dashboards_JS_Package.md)
- [Scripts of Dashboards.PHP Package](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Dashboards_PHP_Package.md)
- [Files of Stimulsoft Designer Application](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Stimulsoft_Designer_App.md)
- [Files of Stimulsoft Designer.JS Application](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Stimulsoft_Designer_JS_App.md)
- [Files of Stimulsoft Demo Application](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Deployment/Files_in_Stimulsoft_Demo_App.md)

## Reports and Dashboards for ASP.NET Core Razor

- [How this Works](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Reports_Web/ASP_NET_Core_Razor/Using_Web_Viewer/How_to_Work.md)

- [Loading and Saving Report](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Reports.Dashboards.Programming.Manual/Reports_JS/Engine/Loading_and_Saving_Report.md)
